summary: Test coverage assessment: The existing test file (tests/ClaudeManager.Hub.Tests/test_Builldetail_Scripts.cs) has 9 clear test failures. Many tests lack actual assertions, the test file is in wrong location (tests/ instead of Tests/), and the test class naming is inconsistent (Uses NUnit but should use xUnit per PRD). Critical coverage gaps identified: - Empty tests with no assertions - Invalid Moq API calls - Missing JavaScriptException test cases - Missing database persistence verification. Test execution failed due to .NET SDK version mismatch (.NET 9.0 vs .NET 10.0 target). Multiple acceptance criteria lack adequate test coverage despite test file existence.
